metadata.title: 00後整頓職場系列：雅方羊肉爐篇

structure.description: 00後留學回國秘書開名車上班，建立反差感。
秘書提供簡單早餐，董事長感到傻眼。
秘書利用職權在實驗室吃冰棒享受特權。
秘書進入廚房準備午餐，展現生活白痴的一面。
羊肉爐包裝卡在鍋中，處理過程混亂。
秘書對廚房設備感到崩潰，並被同事責備。
秘書直接將整鍋未拆袋的羊肉爐交給董事長。
秘書拿回手機，完成職場整頓情節。

variables.character: A confident young woman with short hair in a brand uniform
variables.boss: A middle-aged man with glasses in a light blue shirt
variables.scene_office: Modern minimalist office and laboratory environment
variables.product_icecream: Chocolate coated ice cream bar with branding
variables.product_mutton: Frozen mutton hot pot bag with brand logo
variables.brand: Ya Fang logo on uniform and packaging
variables.style: Realistic lifestyle vlog with comedic subtitles

perShot: {character} getting out of a car at {scene_car} with {product_icecream}, {style}.
{character} placing a simple breakfast for {boss} in {scene_office}, {emotion_boss}.
{character} eating {product_icecream} in the lab while showing off {brand}, {style}.
Close-up of {product_mutton} stuck in a cooking pot in {scene_kitchen}.
{character} looking frustrated at kitchen appliances with {emotion_secretary} expression.
{character} serving the messy {product_mutton} pot to {boss} in {scene_office}.
Close-up of {boss} reacting with {emotion_boss} as {character} leaves, {style}.
